title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Practo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Practo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Practo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Practo:
Practo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo!
